name: Alert
benefits: +5 to initiative; cannot be surprised while conscious; other creatures don't gain advantage on attacks against you from being unseen.

name: Athlete
benefits: Standing from prone uses only 5 feet of movement. Climbing doesn't cost extra movement. Make running long/high jump after 5ft running start.

name: Actor
benefits: Advantage on Deception/Persuasion when impersonating; mimic speech of person/sounds of creature heard for at least 1 minute (WIS Insight DC 8 + CHA mod + PB to detect).

name: Charger
benefits: Use Action: Dash; bonus action for melee attack or shove; if moved 10ft straight before attack, +5 damage or push 10ft.

name: Crossbow Expert
benefits: Ignore loading on crossbows you are proficient with; no disadvantage on ranged attacks from being within 5ft of hostile; when Attack action with one-handed weapon, bonus action attack with hand crossbow.

name: Defensive Duelist
benefits: When wielding finesse weapon you're proficient with and another creature hits you with a melee attack, use reaction to add proficiency bonus to AC for that attack.

name: Dual Wielder
benefits: +1 AC while wielding melee weapon in each hand; can use two-weapon fighting with non-light melee weapons; can draw/stow two one-handed weapons.

name: Dungeon Delver
benefits: Advantage on Perception/Investigation to find secret doors; advantage on saves vs traps; resistance to trap damage; travel at normal pace while searching for traps.

name: Durable
benefits: Hit Die roll for HP regain has minimum equal to twice CON modifier (min 2).

name: Elemental Adept
prerequisites: Ability to cast at least 1 spell
benefits: Spells you cast ignore resistance to chosen damage type (acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder); when rolling damage of that type treat 1s as 2s. Can take multiple times.

name: Grappler
benefits: Advantage on attacks against creature you're grappling; can use action to attempt to pin creature you're grappling (target Athletics/Acrobatics vs your Athletics).

name: Great Weapon Master
benefits: On crit/reduce to 0 with melee weapon: bonus action one melee weapon attack; before attack with heavy weapon you have proficiency in: -5 attack +10 damage.

name: Healer
benefits: Use healer's kit to restore 1 HP +1/level (next short/long rest must elapse before you can heal again with this); stabilize at 0 HP.

name: Heavily Armored
benefits: +1 STR (max 20); proficiency with heavy armor.

name: Heavy Armor Master
benefits: +1 STR (max 20); reduce bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage from nonmagical sources by 3 while wearing heavy armor.

name: Inspiring Leader
benefits: Spend 10 minutes to inspire up to 6 friendly creatures within 30ft (must understand you): each gains temp HP = your level + CHA modifier.

name: Keen Mind
benefits: Always know which way is north; always know hours to next sunrise/sunset; recall anything seen/heard within past month.

name: Lightly Armored
benefits: +1 STR or DEX (max 20); proficiency with light armor.

name: Linguist
benefits: Learn 3 languages of choice; can write ciphers (INT check DC = INT score + PB to decode).

name: Lucky
benefits: 3 luck points per long rest. After roll d20 (attack/check/save) before result revealed: spend 1 to roll an additional d20 and choose. Or when attacked: roll 1d20 and choose for attacker.

name: Mage Slayer
benefits: When creature within 5ft of you casts a spell: use reaction to make melee attack against caster; advantage on saves vs spells cast within 5ft; spellcasters take +1 disadvantage on concentration save when you damage them.

name: Magic Initiate
benefits: Choose a class (bard/cleric/druid/sorcerer/warlock/wizard); learn 2 cantrips; learn 1 first-level spell of that class (cast 1/long rest at 1st level).

name: Martial Adept
benefits: Learn 2 maneuvers from Battle Master fighter list; gain 1 superiority die (d6) per short/long rest.

name: Medium Armor Master
benefits: Wearing medium armor doesn't impose disadvantage on Stealth; can add 3 (instead of 2) of DEX modifier to AC.

name: Mobile
benefits: +10ft speed; Dash through difficult terrain costs no extra movement; melee attack against creature does not provoke opportunity attack from that creature for the rest of the turn (whether attack hits or not).

name: Moderately Armored
benefits: +1 STR or DEX (max 20); proficiency with medium armor and shields.

name: Mounted Combatant
benefits: Advantage on melee attack rolls against unmounted creature smaller than mount; force attack targeting mount to target you instead; if mount subjected to DEX save for half: takes none on success and half on failure.

name: Observant
benefits: Lip read if you can see mouth; +5 to passive Perception and Investigation.

name: Polearm Master
benefits: When you take Attack action with glaive/halberd/quarterstaff/spear/pike: bonus action attack with opposite end (1d4 bludgeoning); creatures provoke opportunity attack when entering reach (instead of leaving).

name: Resilient
benefits: +1 to chosen ability (max 20); gain proficiency in saving throws using chosen ability.

name: Ritual Caster
benefits: Choose class with ritual spells; gain ritual book containing 2 1st-level rituals from that class. Can copy more.

name: Savage Attacker
benefits: Once per turn when you roll damage for melee weapon attack you can reroll the weapon's damage dice and use either total.

name: Sentinel
benefits: Creatures provoke opportunity attacks even if Disengage; when you hit creature with opportunity attack, its speed becomes 0 for rest of turn; when creature within 5ft attacks ally (not you): use reaction to attack the attacker.

name: Sharpshooter
benefits: Long-range attacks have no disadvantage; ignore half/three-quarters cover; before attack with ranged weapon you have proficiency in: -5 attack +10 damage.

name: Shield Master
benefits: Bonus action shove with shield (target STR or DEX save vs Athletics); add shield bonus to AC of DEX saves vs effects targeting only you; when subjected to half-damage DEX save: take no damage on success.

name: Skilled
benefits: Gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools.

name: Skulker
benefits: Hide when only lightly obscured from creature you're hiding from; missed ranged attacks don't reveal position; dim light doesn't impose disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks relying on sight.

name: Spell Sniper
prerequisites: Ability to cast at least 1 spell
benefits: Doubled spell attack range; ranged spell attacks ignore half/three-quarters cover; learn one cantrip that requires attack roll (chosen class).

name: Tavern Brawler
benefits: Proficient with improvised weapons; unarmed strike does 1d4 damage; when you hit with unarmed strike or improvised weapon as an action: bonus action grapple attempt.

name: Tough
benefits: HP max increases by 2 × character level; this increases applies retroactively and per level thereafter.

name: War Caster
prerequisites: Ability to cast at least 1 spell
benefits: Advantage on concentration saves; can cast somatic spells with hands full of weapons/shield; can use reaction (instead of opportunity attack) to cast a spell at provoking creature (target only that creature; 1 action casting time).

name: Weapon Master
benefits: +1 STR or DEX (max 20); gain proficiency with 4 weapons of choice.
